concerns.text: Task T031 (calibration) and T033 (blocking logic) are placed in Phase 6, but FR-010 and US-5 mandate that calibration must occur BEFORE the full simulation run (Phase 4). The current task ordering makes it impossible to satisfy the 'calibration before simulation' constraint, leaving FR-010 and US-5 unimplementable as specified.

Task T012 (fetch_datasets) is listed in Phase 3 (US1) alongside generation tasks, but FR-001 and US-1 require dataset ingestion as a prerequisite for explanation generation. The task list lacks an explicit dependency or ordering constraint ensuring T012 completes before T013-T016, risking execution against missing data.

Task T037 ('Add metric to measure cognitive depth') addresses a reviewer concern but has no corresponding FR/SC or User Story in spec.md. The spec defines required fields in FR-004 (correctness, rt, comprehension) but does not define 'cognitive depth' as a required metric. This task implements an unverified requirement not present in the spec.

FR-001 requires ingesting BOTH ASSISTments and Khan Academy datasets. Tasks T012 only mentions 'fallback to HuggingFace ASSISTments subset' and does not include a specific task to implement the Khan Academy ingestion logic, leaving the second half of FR-001 uncovered.

FR-011 and US-7 require integrating real-student data (≥200 participants) into the final analysis. While T034 mentions ingesting real data, there is no explicit task to update the analysis pipeline (T026/T027) to handle the 'data_source' fixed effect as required by FR-011 and SC-004. The analysis tasks in Phase 5 do not reference the real-data integration logic.

FR-009 requires simulating 2,000 students per condition. Task T021 mentions 'process 2,000 students per condition' but does not explicitly include the logic to iterate over all three conditions (neural, symbolic, neuro-symbolic) as required by FR-002 and US-2. The task description is ambiguous on whether it covers the full scope of the requirement.
